title: Trump team bashed Europe for a year. Now he wants support in war on Iran.
summary_full: European leaders are ramping up their response to the crisis spreading outside Iran but remain wary of a conflict that could have untold ramifications.
summary_public: European leaders are ramping up their response to the crisis spreading outside Iran but remain wary of a conflict that could have untold ramifications.

IR.label: negative
